pluginDescription: Filter candidate stations by callsign/prefix rules or advanced regex keep rules.
filterOverviewDesc: Blocklist mode: enter one callsign or prefix per line; matching candidate stations are filtered out. For example, BG5DRB blocks BG5DRB and JA blocks all callsigns starting with JA. Advanced regex keep mode: enter one regex per line; only callsigns matching at least one rule are kept. Lines starting with # are comments. Leave empty to disable filtering.
filterModeDesc: Choose simple callsign/prefix blocklist filtering or advanced regex keep filtering.
filterRulesDesc: Blocklist mode: one callsign or prefix to filter out per line, e.g. BG5DRB or JA. Advanced regex mode: one keep regex per line, e.g. ^JA or ^(BG5DRB|K1ABC)$.
filterRulesInvalidRegexSyntax: Line {{line}} has invalid regex syntax. Please check the expression.
filterScopeDesc: Choose where the filter rules take effect.
